ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Cheese Sauce (52.5%) [Water, Beef (3.5%) (Beef, Preservative (250), Hydrolysed Vegetable Protein (soy), Thickener (407a), Natural Smoke Flavour (soy)}, Cheddar Cheese (3.5%) (Milk), Thickener (1422), Butter (Milk), Milk Solids, Natural Flavours (Milk), Salt; Vegetable Stock (Flavour Enhancers (627, 631) (Wheat)}, Thickener (1440), Spices, Chicken Stock (Flavour Enhancers (627, 631) (Wheat)}, Sugar], Cooked Pasta (46.5%) [Water, wheat Semolina], Cheese Topping (1%) [Mozzarella (Milk), Parmesan (Milk)].
